/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/parallax_client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/parallax_client.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/parallax_client.dir/src/OpenXRApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/parallax_client.dir/src/UdpReceiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/parallax_client.dir/src/MediaCodecDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/parallax_client.dir/src/QuadRenderer.cpp.o -o parallax_client
